mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, description, parent_id, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM steering_category WHERE deleted = false AND enabled = true AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, code, description, parent_id, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM steering_category WHERE deleted = false AND enabled = true ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_category WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = false
SELECT id, name, code, description, parent_id, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM steering_category WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = false LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category_hierarchy ch JOIN steering_category sc ON sc.id = ch.child_category_id WHERE ch.parent_category_id = #{categoryId} AND sc.enabled = TRUE AND sc.deleted = FALSE
